rollbackReason: Emergency rollback after failed 1.51.x production checklist debug endpoint experiments. Do not use preload/http-layer for production gate.
notes: Correct public domain is p01--amio-commnets-max--qkpwxnxqqrnw.code.run with commnets.

debug/store-live can be heavy because it includes full store snapshot; use /debug/ping or /debug/build for quick liveness/version checks.
1.51.x production checklist must not change package startup loader or install HTTP preload layers until a safe in-index route is implemented.
